div.head:
No. 366.
Mr. Fish to Mr. Bingham.
div.p: Sir: Referring to your dispatch No. 131, of the 6th October last, explanatory of your course with reference to co-operation with your colleagues on the occasion of their intervention upon the arrest of a servant of the translating secretary of Her Britannic Majesty’s representative in Japan, I inclose herewith for your information a copy of an instructionSee under Great Britain, Mr. Fish to General Schenck, No. 641. of yesterday’s date, addressed to General Schenck, the minister of the United States, at London, upon the subject.
